details.description: Street-level view of a mid‑rise red‑brick building with a ground-floor bar/restaurant called “Fru Burums.” The facade has a rectilinear grid of modern windows and a green storefront band with yellow diamond details and awnings; an enclosed outdoor seating area is at right. Next door a venue with red neon “FLAMES” signage is visible. In the foreground are embedded tram tracks, overhead catenary wires, asphalt pavement, and a zebra crossing. A bare deciduous street tree, a no‑stopping road sign, and typical Oslo urban streetscape elements are present. Lighting is daylight under light cloud, and the scene suggests a central Oslo neighborhood near Solli plass/Skovveien.

details.description: The image shows a city street scene in Oslo, Norway. A red brick, mid-rise building dominates the scene, with multiple rectangular windows and a ground-floor storefront. The storefront features a green awning and a sign that reads 'BURUMS', suggesting a pub or restaurant. In the foreground, tram tracks run along the street, and overhead tram wires are visible above. A white striped pedestrian crosswalk crosses the street, and a sidewalk with a tree lines the building. The sky is partly cloudy, and daylight illuminates the brick facade and storefront details, indicating an urban center vicinity, likely near Oscars Gate in central Oslo.

details.description: A street-level view of a multi-story red brick building in Oslo, Norway, located on Frognerveien. The building features a functionalist architectural style with a grid of rectangular windows. The ground floor houses two commercial establishments: on the left, a restaurant named "Flamme Burger" with dark signage and red neon visible in the window; on the right, a bar or pub named "fru BURUM'S" with green signage and a covered outdoor seating area protected by an awning. A leafless tree stands on the sidewalk in front of the building. In the foreground, the paved street (Frognerveien) contains double tram tracks running horizontally across the frame and a white zebra crossing (pedestrian crosswalk) in the lower right. A blue and red "No Stopping" traffic sign is mounted on a pole near the crosswalk. To the far left, a portion of an adjacent yellow building is visible. The sky is overcast.

details.description: A street-level view of a multi-story red brick building in the Frogner district of Oslo, Norway. The ground floor houses 'fru BURUMS', a bar and restaurant with a green and white awning and prominent signage. To its left, another establishment, 'Flamme Burger', is visible with red neon lettering. The foreground features a paved road with embedded tram tracks and a white zebra crossing. A single pedestrian is walking on the sidewalk near the entrance of the bar. Overhead, tram power lines are strung across the street, and a yellow building is partially visible on the left edge of the frame.

details.description: Street-level scene in Oslo showing a mid-rise red-brick mixed-use building with ground-floor hospitality venues. The central storefront has a green awning with yellow diamond details and signage reading “Fru Burums,” with an enclosed outdoor seating area to the right. Overhead tram catenary wires cross the frame; in the foreground are double tram tracks and a zebra crossing. A blue no-parking sign stands at the curb, a pedestrian walks along the sidewalk, and a leafless street tree is in front of the facade. The architecture appears mid-20th-century functionalist/modern urban style. Overall setting suggests the Frogner/Uranienborg area with tram service nearby.

details.description: Street-level view of a mid-rise red brick building with a ground-floor pub/restaurant that has a dark green facade and awning with gold diamond accents, evoking a traditional Irish/British pub style. A round projecting sign with stylized white letters (appearing as “FY” or similar) hangs above the entrance. Next door is another storefront with red neon script lettering (appears to read something like “Sabrura” or similar). In the foreground are embedded tram tracks running along the street and a zebra crosswalk. Overhead tram catenary wires and a European no-parking sign are visible. A single pedestrian stands near the pub entrance. Adjacent to the brick structure is an older, lighter-colored stucco building with 19th-century detailing.

details.description: A city street scene featuring a four-story red brick building with rectangular windows. The ground floor houses a cafe/restaurant with a turquoise-green storefront canopy and a vertical sign reading BURUMS. A red neon OPEN sign glows in the entrance. In front of the building is a small tree, and the street has tram tracks embedded in the roadway with a crosswalk of white stripes. Overhead wires run across the street. A person stands near the entrance, giving a sense of scale. The photo appears to be taken from the opposite sidewalk, looking toward the storefront.

details.description: A street-level photograph, rotated 90 degrees clockwise, depicting the facade of a multi-story red brick building in an urban setting. The ground floor houses an establishment named "fru BURUMS" with a dark green storefront, awnings, and white lettering. A circular blue and red "No Stopping" traffic sign is mounted on a pole in front of the entrance. In the foreground, the asphalt street features prominent tram tracks running parallel to the building and a white zebra crossing. A leafless tree stands on the sidewalk, partially obscuring the lower windows. To the right (bottom in the rotated view), an adjacent yellow building with graffiti on the lower wall is visible. The lighting suggests an overcast day.

details.description: A street-level view of a multi-story red brick building in Oslo, Norway. The ground floor features a bar and restaurant named 'fru BURUMS' with green signage and an outdoor seating area under a white awning. In the foreground, there is an asphalt road with tram tracks and a white-striped pedestrian crosswalk. A thin, leafless tree stands on the sidewalk in front of the building. The architecture is a functionalist brick style common in mid-20th century Nordic urban design. A 'no parking' sign is visible on a pole near the restaurant entrance.

details.description: Urban street scene with embedded tram tracks running along an asphalt roadway that intersects a wide zebra crosswalk. Overhead catenary wires for trams are visible. On the left stands a mid‑rise red‑brick building with regularly spaced windows; the ground floor contains retail/food venues with a green awning and illuminated signage. A pedestrian is near the storefront, and a slender street tree with sparse leaves lines the sidewalk. A European-style no‑parking/standing road sign is mounted by the curb. The atmosphere suggests a typical Northern European city street with mixed-use buildings and tram infrastructure.
